what is OGDC

OGDC stands for Oil and Gas Development Company Limited. It is Pakistan's largest state-owned oil and gas exploration and production company. OGDC explores for, develops, and produces crude oil, natural gas, and LPG. It is one of the most valuable companies on PSX and is often the largest constituent of the KSE-100 index.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf

how to open a borkage account

CNIC (Computerized National Identity Card) copy, bank account details (IBAN), completed CRF form, signed Risk Disclosure Document, recent photograph, and in some cases, proof of income. Overseas Pakistanis also need passport copies and can use the Roshan Digital Account.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf

CNIC (Computerized National Identity Card) copy, bank account details (IBAN), completed CRF form, signed Risk Disclosure Document, recent photograph, and in some cases, proof of income. Overseas Pakistanis also need passport copies and can use the Roshan Digital Account.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
what is IPO

IPO stands for Initial Public Offering. It is when a private company sells its shares to the public for the first time and gets listed on the stock exchange. Through an IPO, regular investors can buy shares of the company at the offering price. After the IPO, the shares start trading on PSX and the price is determined by supply and demand. IPOs can be a good investment opportunity but also carry risk since the company has no public track record yet.

Sources: stocksense_knowledge_base.txt
what is RSI

RSI stands for Relative Strength Index. It is a momentum indicator that measures the speed and magnitude of recent price changes, ranging from 0 to 100. An RSI above 70 suggests a stock is overbought (may fall). Below 30 suggests it is oversold (may rise). It helps identify potential trend reversals.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
what is prediction for PSO

PSO stands for Pakistan State Oil Company Limited. It is Pakistan's largest oil marketing company, responsible for importing, storing, and distributing petroleum products (petrol, diesel, furnace oil, etc.) across Pakistan. PSO is a state-owned enterprise listed on PSX.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
